# Green Void: The Feeding Black Hole

A Pen created on CodePen.

Original URL: [https://codepen.io/Odyssey-os/pen/YPWKoLM](https://codepen.io/Odyssey-os/pen/YPWKoLM).

A 3D interactive Black Hole visualization using Three.js and Post-Processing (Bloom).

Features:
- 🟢 Dynamic Event Horizon: Custom shaders create a swirling, neon green accretion disk.
- 🌌 Gravitational Pull: Watch as thousands of stars and orbiting planets are slowly sucked into the void.
- 💥 Spaghettification: Planets stretch and distort as they cross the event horizon.
- ✨ Glow Effects: UnrealBloomPass creates a radioactive neon atmosphere.

Controls:
- Left Click + Drag: Rotate Camera
- Scroll: Zoom In/Out
